[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001100 2
1 0001100 2
2 0011111 5
3 0001011 3
4 0000001 1
5 0000000 a
6 0101000 2
7 1001000 2

01 10 1001000 2 match 7
12 21 0001100 2 match 0 1
23 32 0001100 2 match 0 1

45 54 0001011 3 match 3
56 65 0000001 1 match 4
67 76 0000000 a match 5
70 07 0101000 2 match 6

13 31 1001100 3
24 42 0001100 2 match 0 1

71 17 0001000 1

36 63 0010001 2
47 74 0001000 1
50 05 1101010 4
61 16 0000000 a match 5
72 27 0101000 2 match 6

26 62 0000000 a match 5
37 73 0001000 1
